module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

topic.title: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) in SAP TM

learningObjectives.title: Understand KPI purpose
learningObjectives.description: Explain KPIs as measurable indicators for transportation efficiency and quality.

learningObjectives.title: Understand KPI categories
learningObjectives.description: Describe planning, execution, settlement, financial, carrier, and resource KPIs.

learningObjectives.title: Understand KPI-driven improvement
learningObjectives.description: Clarify how KPI analysis enables corrective actions and performance optimization.

sections.title: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) in SAP TM

sections.content: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) are measurable values used to evaluate the efficiency, effectiveness and quality of transportation operations. SAP TM provides standard KPIs that help organizations monitor planning, execution, freight settlement, carrier performance and transportation costs. These KPIs enable data-driven decision making and continuous process improvement.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: KPIs transform transportation data into measurable business performance indicators.

A logistics company notices its On-Time Delivery KPI has dropped from 96% to 89%. SAP TM dashboards reveal that delays are primarily caused by one transportation carrier. Based on KPI analysis, management reallocates shipments to better-performing carriers, restoring service levels.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Track a small set of meaningful KPIs instead of monitoring too many metrics. Focus on indicators that directly support business objectives.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global FMCG company monitored carrier acceptance rate, truck utilization and freight cost per shipment using SAP TM dashboards. Continuous KPI monitoring reduced transportation costs by approximately 12% within one year.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Remember the most commonly tested SAP TM KPIs: On-Time Delivery, Transportation Cost, Vehicle Utilization, Carrier Performance and Freight Cost per Shipment.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: A KPI is useful only if corrective actions are taken based on its results. Simply monitoring KPIs without improvement initiatives provides limited business value.

items: SAP TM provides planning, execution, financial and carrier KPIs.
KPIs support operational and strategic decision-making.
Dashboards visualize KPI trends for business users.
Continuous KPI monitoring improves logistics performance.
